exampleContent.sectionSubtitle: Real prompts and articles from this template

prompts.title: Example Action Prompts
prompts.subtitle: Practical tasks to move your college planning forward
items: Create a detailed inventory of your academic strengths, interests, and career goals
Research and compile a list of 15-20 colleges that match your academic profile and interests
Schedule and complete campus visits or virtual tours for your top 5-8 college choices
Meet with your school counselor to review graduation requirements and plan your remaining high school coursework
Research and understand the financial aid process by completing the FAFSA4caster or net price calculators for 5 target colleges
Take a diagnostic practice test for the SAT or ACT to establish your baseline scores and identify areas for improvement
